description_long: This object is a classic portable radio receiver with a rectangular yellow body and a prominent black speaker grille on the front. It features two large circular speakers, a central control panel with buttons and a display, and a telescopic metal antenna extending from the top. The front panel includes a frequency indicator and tuning knobs, while the sides are relatively plain. The radio is depicted emitting musical notes, suggesting it is in use, and is illuminated by two colored spotlights from above. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage boomboxes, with a sturdy plastic casing and metallic accents.
description: A yellow, rectangular portable radio receiver with dual speakers, a central control panel, and a telescopic antenna, styled like a vintage boombox.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dual black speaker grilles, central control panel with buttons and display, and the extended antenna.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the radio and the protruding antenna, with less detail visible on the control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain yellow back of the radio, with the antenna and musical notes still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the radio's side and the antenna's position.
